Frontier-orbital calculation on O₂ (dioxygen, 2 atoms) using DFT at tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF UKS) — gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet open-shell). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz; single-point on fixed geometry. Density fitting: OFF (exact four-centre integrals). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.2880586 eV
HOMO (index 15): −8.8739616 eV (occupation 1.0)
LUMO (index 16): −3.5859031 eV (occupation 0.0)
Total electronic energy: −150.38872 Hartree / −4092.2855 eV
